✿ About Me

Words are my medium

I'm a copyeditor, proofreader, and writer with a flair for languages, grammar, and research. I specialise in content that's engaging and accessible — pieces that have a story to tell.

From audio drama scripts at Pocket FM to front-page news at The Free Press Journal, I've worked across formats, industries, and audiences — always bringing thoughtful editorial judgement and human warmth to the page.

Currently pursuing my Master's in Journalism and Mass Communications at Manipal University, Jaipur — while working as an Editor at Wilco International.

Copy Editing Proofreading Content Writing Creative Writing Storytelling SEO Research Localisation Social Media Canva WordPress AI Editing
"

I'm particularly passionate about working on pieces that have a story to tell — content that connects, resonates, and lingers.

✿ Work History

Experience & Craft

✦
Editor & Proofreader
Wilco International LLP + Woodpecker Books
May 2025 – Present
  • Editing classic manuscript titles for Wilco Publishing and children's books for its imprint Woodpecker Books, focusing on readability, tone, consistency, and house style.
  • Collaborating with authors, illustrators, and internal teams to prepare books for print and digital release.
  • Planning and creating social media content, including ideating and acting in short promotional reels.
  • Moderating monthly readers' book discussion sessions for Bargain Bookhut, guiding conversations and encouraging community-building.
Manuscript Editing Proofreading House Style Print & Digital Publishing
✿
Editorial Review Assistant
Pocket FM
Sep 2023 – May 2025
  • Edited, proofread, and localised audio series scripts for Pocket FM's US market, ensuring adherence to legal and editorial standards.
  • Main writer of popular show Ruthless Rick — used AI tools to assist with script drafting, then manually refined and localised language for natural, engaging audio output.
  • Leveraged AI tools for script generation and voiceovers; provided human editorial oversight to eliminate impersonal tone and factual errors.
  • Coordinated with writers, production, US-based agencies, and Gen-AI tech teams to maintain story quality and consistency.
  • Experienced across genres: Rom-com, Fantasy, Magic Realism, Horror, Thriller.
Script Writing Localisation Audio Editorial AI-Assisted Writing
❧
Subeditor
The Free Press Journal, Nariman Point
Jun 2022 – Sep 2023
  • Edited and proofread news articles for the City page and Front page.
  • Fact-checking and verifying sources before publication.
  • Wrote attention-grabbing headlines and carried out copyediting.
  • Coordinated with layout and design team to build pages; communicated regularly with reporters and chief editors.
News Editing Headline Writing Fact-Checking
◈
Content Writer
Volume Stories
Nov 2021 – Nov 2022
  • Wrote, edited, researched, and proofread pieces for an immersive visual publishing platform.
  • Covered diverse topics including History of Anime, Colonial Mentality, Male Gaze vs Female Gaze, Ada Lovelace, Do Doppelgangers Exist?, De-Aging Technology in Films, and more.
  • Conceptualised campaign ideas, increasing social media audience engagement.
Long-form Research Writing Content Strategy Social Media
✦
Content Writer
IcyCanada (Icy Tales) ↗
Jul – Aug 2021
  • Researched and drafted SEO-optimised articles (3,000+ words) for a travel website.
SEO Writing Travel Content

✿ Beyond Work

Involvement & Leadership

Content Head & Committee Core
VG Vaze College · English Literary Association · Oct 2018 – Apr 2022
Managed a team of 40+ members, spearheading content strategy for social media, reels, blog articles, event brochures, and promotional materials. Organised Drama Fests, Open Mics, Tape-A-Tales, and conducted an interview with a commissioning editor from Penguin Random House India.
Public Relations Associate
Vaze Model United Nations · Aug – Nov 2018
Part of the organising committee for VMUN 2018-19. Created content across social media platforms, wrote captions and promo video scripts for YouTube, managed on-day logistics, and acted as primary point of contact for delegates.
